name: Caixa Rio Bravo Fundo De Fundos De Investimento Imobiliario II-Cotas
summary: Caixa Rio Bravo Fundo De Fundos De Investimento Imobiliario II-Cotas is a real estate fund of funds (FOF) in Brazil. It invests in other real estate investment funds (FIIs) with the objective of generating income and capital appreciation. The fund is managed by Rio Bravo Investimentos.
